Timing API

MP3Quran Timing API
 3.0.2 
OAS 3.0

/api-doc/timing_api_openapi.json

Ayat timing endpoints — عرض توقيتات الآيات. Also documents related v3 catalog endpoints (riwayat, reciters) used with timing data.

the developer - Website
Servers

Ayat Timing

Get a list of ayat timing for a specific read and surah.

Timing Reads

Mushafs that have timing data on a per-ayah level

Chapters

Surahs available for a given mushaf

Riwayat

Get a list of all available riwayat (narration styles), ordered by added date.

Reciters

Get a list of reciters with their reads (moshaf), ordered by name. Filter by reciter, rewaya, sura, or last update date.

Timing updates

Paginated snapshot of updates across four feeds: reciters (authors), mushafs types, surah tracks (surah reads), and per-verse timing rows. Each feed uses the same page and limit. Optional last_update filters rows to those updated on or after the given time.
